title: Two different employer salaries are distinct income — not a duplicate

expected_output.reasoning: Different TAN values confirm different employers. These are distinct salary income items from a job change (PAT-004 scenario). Both must be summed.

notes: Two entries with the same income_head but different TANs (different employers) are not duplicates — they are additive. The duplicate detection rule must not fire here. This is the boundary test: same head, different source identity. Different TAN = different income origin.
